title: 日本ダービーの後に・運命の明星

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race is finished—Admire Vega places first.
She enters the winner's circle savoring all the
excitement and delight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next is the final race of the Classic Triple Crown,
the Kikuka Sho. Admire Vega promises her rivals
that they will compete once again there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, they happily await the approaching
summer.
